_comments: After changing ANDROID_PACKAGE, APP_DISPLAY_NAME, APK_BASENAME, etc.: run `npm run sync:android` (or `npm install` — postinstall runs the same sync).
Build release APK (sync + assembleRelease): `npm run android:release`.
Build and install: `npm run android:release:install` (uses ANDROID_HOME / default SDK platform-tools if `adb` is not on PATH).
